

| ![][image1] | Why did we take up the full screen. Why not follow launch pad and peerreview style of centering Background no moving with mouse no parallax. Need more nodes and dots in the background The icon can have a smooth rotate always wherever its present similar to peerreview |
| :---- | :---- |
| ![][image2] | Featured skills not centered |
| Front page needs to have more data on how the exchange works |  |
| No animation transition at all |  |
| ![][image3] | After signing in it takes again to the homepage and whats that google\_ we should collect name and other details  |
| ![][image4] | Why using default dropdown this is a basic skill to use the theme dropdowns and button and input box everywhere |
| ![][image5] | Market place page looks cramped up. Take some world class marketplace with best design and use that  |
| Need more skills that i have 10 pages |  |
| I see constant loading symbol during page nav even for back page | Loading symbol should use our icon everywhere |
| ![][image6] | Why is the screenshot cropped at top |
| The font doesnt look professional |  |
| ![][image7] | Not good can be improved |
|  |  |
| ![][image8] | The marketplace is the main page and it looks like shit. Lets have icons for the skills as well it could be optional |
| ![][image9] | Not good can be improved How do i upload my profile pic. Look at how odd it is not being centered. |
| ![][image10] | What is this We are populating data on our own and you are showing zero Like i said i should have 10 pages of skills from every domain and well articulated not just plain skills And since all the users are us why didnt you make rating and reviews and downloads. Do the full circle a user coming in should know that the exchange is vast and people are actively using |
